mapper.select:
select stage, ready_pending as readyPending, delayed_pending as delayedPending, running, oldest_ready_at as oldestReadyAt from ( select 'LOAD_PROCESS' as stage, coalesce(sum(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at <= #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then 1 else 0 end), 0) as ready_pending, coalesce(sum(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at > #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then 1 else 0 end), 0) as delayed_pending, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'RUNNING' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as running, min(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at <= #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then available_at end) as oldest_ready_at from patient_raw_data_collect_task
union all
select 'NORMALIZE' as stage, coalesce(sum(case when status in ('STRUCT_PENDING', 'STRUCT_FAILED') and available_at <= #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then 1 else 0 end), 0) as ready_pending, coalesce(sum(case when status in ('STRUCT_PENDING', 'STRUCT_FAILED') and available_at > #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then 1 else 0 end), 0) as delayed_pending, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'STRUCT_RUNNING' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as running, min(case when status in ('STRUCT_PENDING', 'STRUCT_FAILED') and available_at <= #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then available_at end) as oldest_ready_at from patient_raw_data_change_task
union all
select 'EVENT_EXTRACT' as stage, coalesce(sum(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at <= #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then 1 else 0 end), 0) as ready_pending, coalesce(sum(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at > #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then 1 else 0 end), 0) as delayed_pending, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'RUNNING' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as running, min(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at <= #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then available_at end) as oldest_ready_at from infection_event_task where task_type = 'EVENT_EXTRACT'
union all
select 'CASE_RECOMPUTE' as stage, coalesce(sum(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at <= #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then 1 else 0 end), 0) as ready_pending, coalesce(sum(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at > #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then 1 else 0 end), 0) as delayed_pending, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'RUNNING' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as running, min(case when status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and available_at <= #{now} and attempt_count < max_attempts then available_at end) as oldest_ready_at from infection_event_task where task_type = 'CASE_RECOMPUTE' ) snapshot_rows
